name: YANN
lore: A bonus-round theorist who interrupts clean matchup charts with old-school conviction and a very heavy seminar slide.

ATK.rationale: Bonus-round offense comes from public AI research stature and contrarian pressure.

DEF.rationale: Long-running research credibility gives solid defensive ballast.

SPD.rationale: The wildcard is more seminar pressure than shipping velocity.

COMBO.rationale: JEPA and energy-based-model narratives create high theory-combo disruption.

HP.rationale: Decades of research reputation give the wildcard staying power.

threatScore.rationale: Threat is parody-weighted: he can derail a clean arena storyline with one contrarian theory combo.

name: FRANCOIS
lore: A puzzle-class wildcard whose attacks look confused until the judge realizes the whole arena was the test set.

ATK.rationale: ARC-style evaluation pressure is more precise than explosive.

DEF.rationale: Benchmark skepticism and abstraction discipline create strong defensive critique.

SPD.rationale: The wildcard operates on research cadence, not product cadence.

COMBO.rationale: Keras, ARC, and reasoning critique combine into a high-combo evaluation weapon.

HP.rationale: Durable developer and research influence keeps the wildcard relevant.

threatScore.rationale: Threat is parody-weighted: he punishes shallow benchmark narratives.

name: RICHARD
lore: A patient reinforcement wildcard who refuses flashy combos and still collects the reward at the end of the episode.

ATK.rationale: Reinforcement-learning doctrine creates pressure at the research-foundation level.

DEF.rationale: Long-horizon theory and discipline make the wildcard hard to knock out.

SPD.rationale: Academic time constants make speed intentionally low.

COMBO.rationale: The bitter-lesson frame combos with every scaling and agent debate.

HP.rationale: Foundational RL influence gives maximum durability.

threatScore.rationale: Threat is parody-weighted: he buffs whichever side remembers the bitter lesson.

name: JURGEN
lore: An ultra-rare boss popup. If he appears, the arena remembers the entire fight tree and the round is effectively over.

ATK.rationale: The bonus boss is intentionally overpowered as a comedy interrupt.

DEF.rationale: Parody durability reflects decades of priority-claim stamina.

SPD.rationale: The LSTM-lock gag gives him unrealistic arcade speed.

COMBO.rationale: Every historical callback chains into another callback.

HP.rationale: The wildcard is a joke boss with intentionally absurd staying power.

threatScore.rationale: Threat is intentionally maxed by the LSTM-lock rule in the battle engine.
